---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement
What problem does this solve? Why is it needed?

## Proposed Solution
Describe what you would like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative approaches you considered.

## Additional Context
Screenshots, mockups, or other context.

## Priority
- [ ] Low (nice to have)
- [ ] Medium (would improve the system)
- [ ] High (blocks important use case)
